About  Tarot, I Ching and Astrology



Welcome to iFate.com: The Home of Immersive Self-Discovery

iFate.com redefines the world of online spirituality by combining ancient wisdom with stunning, interactive technology. We are the premier destination for DIY esoteric experiences, anchored by our award-winning I Ching and featuring vibrant, game-like applications for Tarot, Astrology, and Numerology.

We take pride in offering a strictly family-friendly and brand-safe environment. Unlike many other platforms, iFate contains zero User-Generated Content (UGC). This ensures that every visit is a curated, distraction-free experience—an oasis for focus and reflection without the noise or toxicity of public forums.

Whether you are here for a quick horoscope or a deep I Ching session, you are entering a safe, high-quality space designed for everyone.

More Awesome  Stuff:

TAROT READING
The Celtic Cross

This is the most famous tarot-card spread of all.

The 10-card Celtic Cross tarot-spread offers complex and insightful readings into a wide variety of subjects.

Give it a try now!

 

start this reading
RUNE READING
The Well

According to Norse mythology, the Well of Wyrd (Well of Fate) is where the great Tree of Life draws water. Legends say Odin discovered the runes at the roots of the tree itself.

Use this spread for complex situations and challenges.
